title: Reach the Right Audience by Advertising with the Naval Institute
description: FOR A CENTURY AND A HALF, the Naval Institute has created impact and outcomes that have underpinned the success of the Navy, Marine Corps, and Coast Guard. text:
2026 U.S. Naval Institute Media Planner
2026 Media Kit by U.S. Naval Institute
FOR A CENTURY AND A HALF, the Naval Institute has created impact and outcomes that have underpinned the success of the Navy, Marine Corps, and Coast Guard. It's a serious mission, and end users, decision makers, and influencers know that when they need their ideas to make a difference, they need the Naval Institute.
As a result of its unique forum, the Naval Institute's content platforms combine heritage, immediacy, relevance, and state-of-the-art tool to provide advertisers with the best way to reach their key audiences.
Military readers consistently rank Proceedings as a “must read” and as the “most credible,” “most relevant,” and “most important” among all military journals. For this reason, Institute media command great respect. Virtually every major news organization has quoted or linked to the U.S. Naval Institute as an authoritative source, doing so more than 500,000 times in 2019 alone. With the launch of its daily news site, USNI News, the Institute has expanded its reach, achieving more than two million page views per month during 2020. It has become a source of sources for the media, domestic and international.
For more information on advertising, contact Lewis Duncan, our Director of Corporate Strategic Partnerships & Advertising, at lduncan@usni.org or 410-295-1041.
